# constraints.txt — exact-version lock for reproducible installs.
# Generated by 'pip freeze' from the validated build venv (Python 3.12).
# Apply with: pip install -r requirements.txt -c constraints.txt
# requirements.txt holds the human-maintained ranges; this file pins the
# exact validated versions. Constraint-only entries (e.g. extras no longer
# required by requirements.txt) are inert — pip only pins what gets installed.
# Regenerate from a clean 'pip install -r requirements.txt' venv when bumping deps.
#
